name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0

name: reporting_period_present
description: Reporting period is required to evaluate covenant compliance.

name: compliance_status_present
expression: compliance_status IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(compliance_status)) > 0
description: Compliance status should be explicitly captured or reviewed.

name: actual_ratios_non_negative
expression: (dscr_actual IS NULL OR dscr_actual >= 0) AND (leverage_actual IS NULL OR leverage_actual >= 0)
description: Actual covenant ratios should not be negative.

name: exceptions_array_valid
description: Exceptions and waivers should be represented as an array.
